ceiling_8_revision: Ceiling 8 (no time-series historical) is PARTIALLY FALSE. Per-SET history is available (~daily granularity). Per-EDITION and per-MOMENT history remain blocked.
feature_unlock: Indices: TS500 + per-tier + per-series + per-team can use real set-history series instead of accumulator-only
Set retrospective surfaces get a 30/90d chart for free
Set page header gets a real chart on first render
limitations: Volume not exposed in this payload — only price
